questions.question: Describe the difference between MediaPlayer and MediaPlayerController in Android. Provide an example of when you would use each.
Write a Java method to play a sound file (.mp3) using MediaPlayer. Explain the potential errors that may occur and how to handle them.
A user requests a text-to-speech functionality in an Android app. Explain the AndroidTextToSpeech class and provide a basic example of how to use it.
